scripts.build:bundle: bun run build:game && bun run build:studio
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run build:bundle
scripts.build:prod: bun run typecheck && bun build src/main.ts --target=browser --format=iife --outfile=dist/goldenlap.js --minify --reject-unresolved && bun build src/track-studio-main.ts --target=browser --format=iife --outfile=dist/track-studio.js --minify --reject-unresolved
scripts.test:unit: bun run build && bun run check:boundaries && bun run test:unit:raw
scripts.test:invariants: bun test tests/unit/core/racing-line.test.ts tests/unit/core/track-profile.test.ts tests/unit/session/paths.test.ts tests/unit/session/relations.test.ts tests/unit/session/pit.test.ts tests/unit/session/traffic.test.ts tests/unit/tools/headless-sim.test.ts
scripts.test:headless-parity: bun run build && bun run test:headless-parity:raw
scripts.test:browser: bun run build && bun run test:browser:raw
scripts.test:season: bun run build && bun run test:season:raw
scripts.verify:deterministic:fast: bun run build && bun run check:boundaries && bun run test:unit:raw && bun run test:invariants && bun run validate:profiles && bun run test:headless-parity:raw && bun run test:browser:smoke:raw
scripts.verify:deterministic: bun run build && bun run check:boundaries && bun run test:unit:raw && bun run test:invariants && bun run validate:profiles && bun run test:headless-parity:raw && bun run test:browser:raw && bun run test:prod
scripts.verify:fast: bun run verify:deterministic:fast && bun run test:stats:fast
scripts.verify: bun run verify:deterministic && bun run test:stats:normal
scripts.verify:release: bun run verify && bun run test:stats:full && bun run evidence:release
